infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Lesio uses your camera to capture skin lesion images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Lesio accesses your photos to analyze skin lesions.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Lesio uses your location to show nearby dermatologists.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Lesio to access your camera.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Lesio to access your photos.
